languages.text: "Что это? "Литания Последнего Покаяния?" Должно быть, вы шутите? Не мне надлежит слагать подобные строки". {n}Несмотря на то, что в руках Себериан держит свой собственный дневник, его недоумение выглядит искренним.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Что это? "Литания Последнего Покаяния?" Должно быть, вы шутите? Не мне надлежит слагать подобные строки". {n}Несмотря на то, что в руках Себериан держит свой собственный дневник, его недоумение выглядит искренним.{/n}

languages.text: "What is this? 'The Litany of the Last Repentance'? You must be joking. It does not befit me to write such words." {n}Despite the fact that Seberian is holding his own diary, his confusion seems genuine.{/n}

"What is this? 'The Litany of the Last Repentance'? You must be joking. It does not befit me to write such words." {n}Despite the fact that Seberian is holding his own diary, his confusion seems genuine.{/n}

"What is this? 'A Thousand and One Litanies to Praise the God-Emperor?' You must be joking? I never wrote such a thing." {n}Despite the fact that Seberian is holding his own diary, his confusion seems genuine.{/n}

"What is this? 'The Litany of the Last Repentance'? You must be joking. It does not befit me to write such words." {n}Despite the fact that Seberian is holding his own diary, his confusion seems genuine.{/n}

"What is this? 'The Litany of the Last Repentance'? You must be joking. It does not befit me to write such words." {n}Despite the fact that Seberian is holding his own diary, his confusion seems genuine.{/n}

languages.text: “这是什么？《最终忏悔祷文》？你肯定是在开玩笑吧。这种东西根本不是我会写出来的。”{n}尽管手里攥着的是自己的日记本，但塞贝里安表现出来的困惑不像是装的。{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is this? 'The Litany of the Last Repentance'? You must be joking. It does not befit me to write such words." {n}Despite the fact that Seberian is holding his own diary, his confusion seems genuine.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “这是什么？《最终忏悔祷文》？你肯定是在开玩笑吧。这种东西根本不是我会写出来的。”{n}尽管手里攥着的是自己的日记本，但塞贝里安表现出来的困惑不像是装的。{/n}

languages.text: « Qu'est-ce que c'est ? "La Litanie du dernier repentir" ? Vous plaisantez, j'espère ? Il serait indigne de ma part d'écrire ce genre de chose. » {n}Bien qu'il tienne son propre journal entre ses mains, la confusion de Seberian semble sincère.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is this? 'The Litany of the Last Repentance'? You must be joking. It does not befit me to write such words." {n}Despite the fact that Seberian is holding his own diary, his confusion seems genuine.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Qu'est-ce que c'est ? "La Litanie du dernier repentir" ? Vous plaisantez, j'espère ? Il serait indigne de ma part d'écrire ce genre de chose. » {n}Bien qu'il tienne son propre journal entre ses mains, la confusion de Seberian semble sincère.{/n}

languages.text: "Bu nedir? 'Son Tövbe İlahisi' mi? Şaka yapıyor olmalısın. Böyle sözler yazmak bana yakışmaz." {n}Seberian, kendi günlüğünü tutuyor olmasına rağmen kafa karışıklığı gerçek görünüyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is this? 'The Litany of the Last Repentance'? You must be joking. It does not befit me to write such words." {n}Despite the fact that Seberian is holding his own diary, his confusion seems genuine.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bu nedir? 'Son Tövbe İlahisi' mi? Şaka yapıyor olmalısın. Böyle sözler yazmak bana yakışmaz." {n}Seberian, kendi günlüğünü tutuyor olmasına rağmen kafa karışıklığı gerçek görünüyor.{/n}

languages.text: «¿Qué es esto? ¿"La letanía del último arrepentimiento"? Tiene que ser una broma. Esas palabras no pueden haber salido de mi puño y letra». {n}A pesar de que Seberian sostiene su propio diario, su confusión parece sincera.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is this? 'The Litany of the Last Repentance'? You must be joking. It does not befit me to write such words." {n}Despite the fact that Seberian is holding his own diary, his confusion seems genuine.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¿Qué es esto? ¿"La letanía del último arrepentimiento"? Tiene que ser una broma. Esas palabras no pueden haber salido de mi puño y letra». {n}A pesar de que Seberian sostiene su propio diario, su confusión parece sincera.{/n}

languages.text: "Was ist das? 'Die Litanei der letzten Buße'? Soll das ein Scherz sein? Diese Worte klingen nicht nach mir." {n}Trotz der Tatsache, dass Seberian sein eigenes Tagebuch in der Hand hält, scheint er aufrichtig verwirrt zu sein.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is this? 'The Litany of the Last Repentance'? You must be joking. It does not befit me to write such words." {n}Despite the fact that Seberian is holding his own diary, his confusion seems genuine.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Was ist das? 'Die Litanei der letzten Buße'? Soll das ein Scherz sein? Diese Worte klingen nicht nach mir." {n}Trotz der Tatsache, dass Seberian sein eigenes Tagebuch in der Hand hält, scheint er aufrichtig verwirrt zu sein.{/n}

languages.text: 「これは何だ？『最後の悔い改めの祈文』か。冗談だろう。こんな言葉を書くのは、私にふさわしくない」{n}シベリアは自分の日記を手にしているが、彼の混乱は本物のように思える.{/n}
languages.original_text: "What is this? 'The Litany of the Last Repentance'? You must be joking. It does not befit me to write such words." {n}Despite the fact that Seberian is holding his own diary, his confusion seems genuine.{/n}
